implementation_log: Implemented T17 as a static-first MVP validation harness focused on architecture/contracts/workflow boundaries. Added a new tw_mvp-marked test suite that validates current symbol acceptance behavior (.TW allowed, .TWO rejected), AppContext placeholder dependency contract behavior, deterministic batch workflow record/metadata shapes, failure isolation record behavior, and reporting compatibility from batch BacktestResult shape using in-memory reporting/store stubs. Added pytest marker registration for tw_mvp with no source feature changes.
test_execution_summary: Command A: `pytest -q -m "tw_mvp and not integration"` -> 7 passed, 255 deselected in 0.27s. Command B (required gate): `pytest -q -m "tw_mvp"` -> 7 passed, 255 deselected in 0.16s.
summary: T17 validation harness is implemented within scope as deterministic tests/config only, with required tw_mvp gate evidence captured.
next_action: Send T17 implementation to Manager/QA for specification and boundary validation.
